name: Acolyte
starting_equipment: Choose A or B: (A) Calligrapher's Supplies, Book (prayers), Holy Symbol, Parchment (10 sheets), Robe, 8 GP; or (B) 50 GP
description: Eligible ability scores: INT, WIS, CHA. Origin feat: Magic Initiate (Cleric).

name: Criminal
starting_equipment: Choose A or B: (A) 2 Daggers, Thieves' Tools, Crowbar, 2 Pouches, Traveler's Clothes, 16 GP; or (B) 50 GP
description: Eligible ability scores: DEX, CON, INT. Origin feat: Alert.

name: Sage
starting_equipment: Choose A or B: (A) Quarterstaff, Calligrapher's Supplies, Book (history), Parchment (8 sheets), Robe, 8 GP; or (B) 50 GP
description: Eligible ability scores: CON, INT, WIS. Origin feat: Magic Initiate.

name: Soldier
starting_equipment: Choose A or B: (A) Spear, Shortbow, 20 Arrows, Gaming Set (same as above), Healer's Kit, Quiver, Traveler's Clothes, 14 GP; or (B) 50 GP
description: Eligible ability scores: STR, DEX, CON. Origin feat: Savage Attacker.
